'''''Swift Liberty''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Areta Bell]] and was often paired with the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Moonshadow (Imperial II-class)|''Moonshadow'']]. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Cyslo]] was the helmsman for the ''Swift Liberty'', while [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Tal'kina]] served as the [[Sensor officer/Legends|sensor officer]].<ref name="Isard's Revenge" />

''Swift Liberty'' participated in the New Republic [[Battle of Liinade III|attack]] of [[Liinade III]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]]'s [[Ciutric Hegemony]]. With the help of the ''[[Freedom]]'', another ''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer, ''Swift Liberty'' hammered the Krennel's ''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer ''[[Direption]]'' into a manageable state allowing New Republic veteran [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] squadron [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to safely head toward their ground targets.<ref name="Isard's Revenge" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
